mapper.select: select rw.*, tu.nx_CU_user_id as trigger_nx_CU_user_id, tu.nx_CU_wx_nick_name as trigger_nx_CU_wx_nick_name, tu.nx_CU_wx_avatar_url as trigger_nx_CU_wx_avatar_url, tu.nx_CU_join_date as trigger_nx_CU_join_date, tpl.nx_community_coupon_id as tpl_nx_community_coupon_id, tpl.nx_community_coupon_name as tpl_nx_community_coupon_name, tpl.discount_amount as tpl_discount_amount, tpl.nx_cp_words as tpl_nx_cp_words, tpl.nx_cp_start_date as tpl_nx_cp_start_date, tpl.nx_cp_stop_date as tpl_nx_cp_stop_date, tpl.nx_cp_file_path as tpl_nx_cp_file_path, tpl.nx_cp_biz_purpose as tpl_nx_cp_biz_purpose, tpl.nx_cp_claim_strategy as tpl_nx_cp_claim_strategy from nx_customer_referral_reward rw left join nx_customer_user tu on tu.nx_CU_user_id = rw.trigger_user_id left join nx_community_coupon tpl on tpl.nx_community_coupon_id = rw.coupon_template_id where rw.nx_customer_referral_reward_id = #{value}
select * from nx_customer_referral_reward where nx_customer_referral_reward_id = #{value} for update
select nx_customer_referral_reward_id from nx_customer_referral_reward where beneficiary_user_id = #{value} and status = 0 order by created_at asc
mapper.insert: insert into nx_customer_referral_reward (beneficiary_type, beneficiary_user_id, trigger_user_id, referral_id, community_id, reward_level, reward_kind, rule_id, coupon_template_id, coupon_name_snapshot, coupon_price_snapshot, coupon_original_price_snapshot, coupon_words_snapshot, coupon_start_date_snapshot, coupon_stop_date_snapshot, coupon_validity_type_snapshot, coupon_validity_days_snapshot, points_amount, status) values (#{beneficiaryType}, #{beneficiaryUserId}, #{triggerUserId}, #{referralId}, #{communityId}, #{rewardLevel}, #{rewardKind}, #{ruleId}, #{couponTemplateId}, #{couponNameSnapshot}, #{couponPriceSnapshot}, #{couponOriginalPriceSnapshot}, #{couponWordsSnapshot}, #{couponStartDateSnapshot}, #{couponStopDateSnapshot}, #{couponValidityTypeSnapshot}, #{couponValidityDaysSnapshot}, #{pointsAmount}, #{status})
mapper.select: select rw.*, tu.nx_CU_user_id as trigger_nx_CU_user_id, tu.nx_CU_wx_nick_name as trigger_nx_CU_wx_nick_name, tu.nx_CU_wx_avatar_url as trigger_nx_CU_wx_avatar_url, tu.nx_CU_join_date as trigger_nx_CU_join_date, tpl.nx_community_coupon_id as tpl_nx_community_coupon_id, tpl.nx_community_coupon_name as tpl_nx_community_coupon_name, tpl.discount_amount as tpl_discount_amount, tpl.nx_cp_words as tpl_nx_cp_words, tpl.nx_cp_start_date as tpl_nx_cp_start_date, tpl.nx_cp_stop_date as tpl_nx_cp_stop_date, tpl.nx_cp_file_path as tpl_nx_cp_file_path, tpl.nx_cp_biz_purpose as tpl_nx_cp_biz_purpose, tpl.nx_cp_claim_strategy as tpl_nx_cp_claim_strategy from nx_customer_referral_reward rw left join nx_customer_user tu on tu.nx_CU_user_id = rw.trigger_user_id left join nx_community_coupon tpl on tpl.nx_community_coupon_id = rw.coupon_template_id where rw.beneficiary_user_id = #{value} and rw.status = 0 order by rw.created_at desc
mapper.delete: delete rw from nx_customer_referral_reward rw inner join nx_customer_user_referral r on r.nx_customer_user_referral_id = rw.referral_id where (r.source_owner_type = #{sourceOwnerType} and r.source_owner_id = #{sourceOwnerId}) or r.promoter_id = #{sourceOwnerId}
